description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a rooftop garden and greenhouse, offering both green space and functional outdoor areas. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored stone or brick, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. A spacious wooden deck surrounds a freeform swimming pool, complemented by outdoor lounge furniture and a shaded cabana. The rooftop includes a fenced garden plot and a glass greenhouse, accessible via an exterior spiral staircase. The property is bordered by manicured grass and includes a raised patio area with railings and seating. The overall design emphasizes open, airy living with a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a rooftop garden, greenhouse, large windows, and a poolside wooden deck with lounge areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, rooftop garden, greenhouse, and a raised patio with railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop garden, greenhouse, spiral staircase, and the full extent of the pool deck.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, wooden deck, outdoor lounge furniture, and access to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the spiral staircase, rooftop patio, and the integration of the greenhouse and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
